_comment: Notion property schema for the Job Tracker database. Used by setup wizard to create the DB; ALSO used by run-job-search Step P-3 to recreate the DB if it goes missing. Keep this single source of truth — do NOT inline the schema as DDL pseudocode anywhere else.
_scoring_note: Match (High/Mid/Low) is the primary signal. Why Fits carries the rationale text; Key Factors carries the bulleted match/concern/gap evidence. Score is reserved (null) — present in the schema only because Notion DBs can't drop a property without affecting the parent. Match Quality + Feedback Comment + Recycled support the learning loop (see jobs-recycle-feedback).
